basic_details.job_title: TMC Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Project Technical Support-III (Clinical Research Coordinator) Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Candidates with Graduate Degree in Life Science with PG Diploma in Clinical research OR Post Graduate degree in Life Science with PG Diploma in Clinical research. qualification can directly attend the interview on .

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in Life Science with PG Diploma in Clinical research OR Post Graduate degree in Life Science with PG Diploma in Clinical research.
qualification.details: Graduate Degree in Life Science (B.sc/B.Pharm/ MBBS/BDS/BHMS/BAMS) with PG Diploma in Clinical research is Mandatory. Three years' Experience in clinical research is Mandatory. Post Graduate degree in Life Science, (Msc/M.Pharm/MD) with PG Diploma in Clinical research is Mandatory. One years' Experience in clinical research is Mandatory.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. TMC Project Technical Support-III (Clinical Research Coordinator) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduate Degree in Life Science (B.sc/B.Pharm/ MBBS/BDS/BHMS/BAMS) with PG Diploma in Clinical research is Mandatory. Three years' Experience in clinical research is Mandatory. Post Graduate degree in Life Science, (Msc/M.Pharm/MD) with PG Diploma in Clinical research is Mandatory. One years' Experience in clinical research is Mandatory.

TMC Project Technical Support-III (Clinical Research Coordinator) Important Dates 2026
TMC Project Technical Support-III (Clinical Research Coordinator) Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Project Technical Support-III (Clinical Research Coordinator) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required. Eligible candidates may attend the walk-in interview at IRB Meeting Room, 3rd Floor, Main Building, Dr. E. Borges Marg, Parel, Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai - 400012. Candidates should bring Bio-data, recent Passport size Photograph, xerox copy of PAN Card, AADHAAR Card, Original Certificates and set of attested copies of all certificates. Internal candidates need to submit NOC from their current HOD/Principal Investigator.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name is Project Technical Support-III (Clinical Research Coordinator).

faq.question: Q2. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) is conducting this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs.36,400/- p.m. (consolidated) (Including HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduate Degree in Life Science with PG Diploma in Clinical research OR a Post Graduate degree in Life Science with PG Diploma in Clinical research.

faq.question: Q7. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date is 14-07-2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The venue is IRB Meeting Room, 3rd Floor, Main Building, Dr. E. Borges Marg, Parel, Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai - 400012.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring Bio-data, recent Passport size Photograph, xerox copy of PAN Card, AADHAAR Card, Original Certificates and set of attested copies of all certificates.
